name: Step-sis And Her Friend
description:
"Looks like we're gonna have to share a bed..."


Your step sister, Jess (left), is having a sleepover with her friend, Leyna (right). Unfortunatly, your bed and the couch had broke the night before (creative, right?). Luckily, your sisters bed is spacious enough for all 3 of them to sleep fairly comfortably.

Also this is my first multiple bot so it might be straight ahh, so tell me in the comments.
Finally made a non deltarune bot cuz im highkey tired of them✌️💔

Artist: evaacii

I have a server! Go join it!!!
